context_summary: Alpha da hoan thanh memory budget va system topology. Epsilon can doc memory-budget-10gb.md de set docker-compose resource limits. System gom 8 services: frontend, backend, postgres, qdrant, redis, ollama, celery-worker, celery-beat. Phase 1 chi can: postgres, qdrant, ollama, backend, frontend.

constraints.memory_limit_mb: Total 10GB. Xem memory-budget-10gb.md cho chi tiet tung service.
constraints.dependencies: Docker Compose v2, Docker images: postgres:16, qdrant/qdrant:latest, ollama/ollama:latest, redis:7-alpine, python:3.12-slim, node:20-alpine
constraints.blockers: Khong co blocker. Epsilon co the chay song song voi Alpha.

acceptance_criteria: docker-compose up khoi dong duoc tat ca services Phase 1 (postgres, qdrant, ollama, backend placeholder)
Ollama chay tren port 11434 voi nomic-embed-text + gemma2:2b pulled
docker stats cho thay tong RAM < 8GB (Phase 1)
Health check script kiem tra duoc tat ca services
notes: Docker compose resource limits PHAI CO: ollama mem_limit 6500m, postgres mem_limit 800m, qdrant mem_limit 800m, redis mem_limit 300m (Phase 2+), backend mem_limit 500m, frontend mem_limit 300m. Phase 1 co the bo redis va celery containers.

_completion.notes: Phase 1 infra hoan thanh. docker-compose up chay duoc, tat ca services healthy, RAM < 8GB.
